title: NASA Chief Says UFO Files Reveal Years of Unexplained Encounters Ignored by Agencies
description: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman comments on recently declassified UFO records, stating they show unexplained phenomena but not alien bodies, and calls for public analysis.
